name: sprint-workflow
description: Sprint workflow orchestration — 9 specialist agents, 22 engineering skills (incl. worktree-handoff for safe subagent/Codex integration), 12 sprint commands (plan/enrich/start/continue/resume-task/handoff/bug-triage/grill/retro/rollback/review/status), automated hooks, auto skill discovery, Linear MCP integration (opt-in), and Codex CLI delegation (opt-in). Batteries included.
